import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

# Tile and color constants
FLOOR = 1
BALL = 3
PYRAMID = 5
HEX = 11

RED = 1
GREEN = 2
BLUE = 3
YELLOW = 5

DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([[-1, 0], [0, 1], [1, 0], [0, -1]], dtype=jnp.int32)


def get_observation(state):
    grid = state.grid
    H, W = grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # Agent info
    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_y = agent_y / (H - 1)
    norm_x = agent_x / (W - 1)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)  # (4,)

    # Pocket info
    pocket_tile = state.agent.pocket[0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    pocket_color = state.agent.pocket[1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
    holding_green_ball = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Blue pyramid location
    blue_pyr_mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    blue_pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy * blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx * blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_norm_y = blue_pyr_y / (H - 1)
    blue_pyr_norm_x = blue_pyr_x / (W - 1)
    blue_pyr_exists = jnp.minimum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)

    # Relative position to blue pyramid
    rel_pyr_y = (blue_pyr_y - agent_y) / (H - 1)
    rel_pyr_x = (blue_pyr_x - agent_x) / (W - 1)
    dist_to_pyr = (jnp.abs(blue_pyr_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(blue_pyr_x - agent_x)) / jnp.float32(H + W - 2)

    # Yellow hex location
    yellow_hex_mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == HEX) & (grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yellow_hex_count = jnp.sum(yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yellow_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy * yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0)
    yellow_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx * yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0)
    yellow_hex_norm_y = yellow_hex_y / (H - 1)
    yellow_hex_norm_x = yellow_hex_x / (W - 1)
    yellow_hex_exists = jnp.minimum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0)

    # Relative position to yellow hex
    rel_hex_y = (yellow_hex_y - agent_y) / (H - 1)
    rel_hex_x = (yellow_hex_x - agent_x) / (W - 1)
    dist_to_hex = (jnp.abs(yellow_hex_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(yellow_hex_x - agent_x)) / jnp.float32(H + W - 2)

    # Green ball on ground (placed)
    green_ball_mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    green_ball_count = jnp.sum(green_ball_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    green_ball_y = jnp.sum(yy * green_ball_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(green_ball_count, 1.0)
    green_ball_x = jnp.sum(xx * green_ball_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(green_ball_count, 1.0)
    green_ball_exists = jnp.minimum(green_ball_count, 1.0)

    # Distance from placed green ball to yellow hex
    dist_ball_to_hex = (jnp.abs(green_ball_y - yellow_hex_y) + jnp.abs(green_ball_x - yellow_hex_x)) / jnp.float32(H + W - 2)

    # Front tile info
    dy = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_id = grid[front_y, front_x, 0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    front_tile_color = grid[front_y, front_x, 1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
    front_is_blue_pyr = ((grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == PYRAMID) & (grid[front_y, front_x, 1] == BLUE)).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_floor = (grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == FLOOR).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Step progress
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 400.0

    # Grid dimensions
    h_norm = jnp.float32(H) / 20.0
    w_norm = jnp.float32(W) / 20.0

    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        jnp.array([norm_y, norm_x], dtype=jnp.float32),          # 2
        dir_oh.astype(jnp.float32),                                # 4
        jnp.array([pocket_tile, pocket_color], dtype=jnp.float32), # 2
        jnp.array([holding_green_ball, pocket_empty], dtype=jnp.float32), # 2
        jnp.array([blue_pyr_norm_y, blue_pyr_norm_x], dtype=jnp.float32), # 2
        jnp.array([rel_pyr_y, rel_pyr_x, dist_to_pyr], dtype=jnp.float32), # 3
        jnp.array([blue_pyr_exists], dtype=jnp.float32),           # 1
        jnp.array([yellow_hex_norm_y, yellow_hex_norm_x], dtype=jnp.float32), # 2
        jnp.array([rel_hex_y, rel_hex_x, dist_to_hex], dtype=jnp.float32), # 3
        jnp.array([yellow_hex_exists], dtype=jnp.float32),         # 1
        jnp.array([green_ball_exists, dist_ball_to_hex], dtype=jnp.float32), # 2
        jnp.array([front_tile_id, front_tile_color], dtype=jnp.float32), # 2
        jnp.array([front_is_blue_pyr, front_is_floor], dtype=jnp.float32), # 2
        jnp.array([step_norm], dtype=jnp.float32),                 # 1
        jnp.array([h_norm, w_norm], dtype=jnp.float32),            # 2
    ])
    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)


def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    grid = state.grid
    next_grid = next_state.grid
    H, W = grid.shape[:2]
    norm_denom = jnp.float32(H + W - 2)

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # === Check milestone 1: picked up blue pyramid (now holding green ball) ===
    was_holding_green_ball = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN))
    now_holding_green_ball = ((next_state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN))

    # Reward for picking up (transition from not holding to holding)
    just_picked_up = (~was_holding_green_ball) & now_holding_green_ball
    pickup_reward = jax.lax.select(just_picked_up, jnp.float32(2.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # === Yellow hex location ===
    yellow_hex_mask = (next_grid[:, :, 0] == HEX) & (next_grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yellow_hex_count = jnp.sum(yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yellow_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy * yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0)
    yellow_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx * yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0)

    # === Check milestone 2: green ball placed adjacent to yellow hex ===
    # Green ball on ground in next state
    green_ball_mask_next = (next_grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (next_grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    green_ball_count_next = jnp.sum(green_ball_mask_next).astype(jnp.float32)
    green_ball_y_next = jnp.sum(yy * green_ball_mask_next).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(green_ball_count_next, 1.0)
    green_ball_x_next = jnp.sum(xx * green_ball_mask_next).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(green_ball_count_next, 1.0)

    # Green ball on ground in current state
    green_ball_mask_cur = (grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    green_ball_count_cur = jnp.sum(green_ball_mask_cur).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Manhattan distance from placed green ball to yellow hex (in next state)
    dist_ball_hex = jnp.abs(green_ball_y_next - yellow_hex_y) + jnp.abs(green_ball_x_next - yellow_hex_x)

    # Ball was just placed (went from pocket to ground)
    ball_just_placed = was_holding_green_ball & (~now_holding_green_ball) & (green_ball_count_next > green_ball_count_cur)

    # Ball is adjacent to hex (dist == 1)
    ball_adjacent_to_hex = (dist_ball_hex <= 1.0) & (green_ball_count_next > 0.0)

    # Success: ball just placed AND adjacent to hex
    success = ball_just_placed & ball_adjacent_to_hex
    success_reward = jax.lax.select(success, jnp.float32(10.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # === Dense shaping rewards ===
    # Phase 1: Guide agent toward blue pyramid when not holding green ball
    blue_pyr_mask_cur = (grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    blue_pyr_count_cur = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask_cur).astype(jnp.float32)
    blue_pyr_y_cur = jnp.sum(yy * blue_pyr_mask_cur).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count_cur, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x_cur = jnp.sum(xx * blue_pyr_mask_cur).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count_cur, 1.0)

    agent_y_cur = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_cur = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_y_next = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_next = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)

    dist_to_pyr_cur = jnp.abs(agent_y_cur - blue_pyr_y_cur) + jnp.abs(agent_x_cur - blue_pyr_x_cur)
    dist_to_pyr_next = jnp.abs(agent_y_next - blue_pyr_y_cur) + jnp.abs(agent_x_next - blue_pyr_x_cur)
    pyr_progress = (dist_to_pyr_cur - dist_to_pyr_next) / norm_denom
    # Only reward when not holding green ball and pyramid exists
    pyr_shaping = jax.lax.select(
        (~was_holding_green_ball) & (blue_pyr_count_cur > 0),
        jnp.float32(0.1) * pyr_progress,
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )

    # Phase 2: Guide agent toward yellow hex when holding green ball
    dist_to_hex_cur = jnp.abs(agent_y_cur - yellow_hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x_cur - yellow_hex_x)
    dist_to_hex_next = jnp.abs(agent_y_next - yellow_hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x_next - yellow_hex_x)
    hex_progress = (dist_to_hex_cur - dist_to_hex_next) / norm_denom
    hex_shaping = jax.lax.select(
        was_holding_green_ball & (yellow_hex_count > 0),
        jnp.float32(0.1) * hex_progress,
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )

    total_reward = pickup_reward + success_reward + pyr_shaping + hex_shaping
    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
